chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1472 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 30.10.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. On 16.10.2025, the following order was passed:- “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. However, learned AAG files comments on behalf of respondent No.3, taken on record. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of petitioner; therefore, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 30.10.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for petitioner” Learned AAG points out that respondent No.3 has filed comments wherein it is stated that the petitioner did not appear in the interview/test conducted on 27.03.2025, in compliance with the order dated 19.11.2024 passed by this Court. Since the petitioner himself did not appear in the said interview/test, he is, at this stage, not entitled to any relief claimed through the present petition. Accordingly, the petition stands dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to apply afresh if vacancies arise in future. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
